---
title: "Analysis Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Overview

This is a minimal, runnable Quarto report. Render it with `quarto render
analysis/report.qmd` (or via the `tar_quarto()` target in `_targets.R`).
Replace this prose with the project's narrative.

## Results from the pipeline

The chunk below reads a target produced by the `{targets}` pipeline. Run
`targets::tar_make()` first so the target store exists.

```{r}
#| label: read-target
# Reads the `doubled` target defined in _targets.R.
doubled <- targets::tar_read(doubled)
doubled
```

The value of `doubled` is `r doubled`.

## Next steps

- TODO: replace the example target with real analysis outputs.
- TODO: add figures and tables sourced from pipeline targets.
